cases.seoTitle: Google OAuth scope mismatch before/after scan example
cases.title: The runtime asks for one scope. The manifest declares another.
cases.description: A synthetic Calendar app shows two objective scope-set differences, then the same project after its runtime, feature, and recording evidence are aligned.
cases.afterLabel: Scope, domain, and evidence traces align
cases.repair: Replace the stale readonly declaration with the shipped write scope, then update the feature and recording step to describe that actual behavior.

cases.seoTitle: Google OAuth demo-video evidence gap before/after example
cases.title: The code and manifest agree. The demo plan still skips the scope.
cases.description: A synthetic Calendar briefing app isolates one missing per-scope recording step without inventing code drift or domain problems.
cases.afterLabel: Every scope has a mapped storyboard step
cases.repair: Add one recording step that starts at the feature route and visibly exercises the declared Calendar scope.

cases.seoTitle: Google OAuth redirect and privacy URL mismatch example
cases.title: The privacy URL duplicates the homepage. A preview redirect escaped the domain set.
cases.description: A synthetic Calendar app demonstrates two secret-free public configuration differences, then the dedicated privacy page and launch redirect values after alignment.
cases.afterLabel: Manifest privacy and redirect values align
cases.repair: Use a dedicated privacy-policy URL and replace the unlisted preview redirect with the intended launch-domain redirect.
